data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "v0.7.1 fully released and verified across all four channels (see evidence comment): PyPI 0.7.1, GitHub Release v0.7.1 auto-created by github-actions[bot] + Latest, MCP Registry 0.7.1 isLatest via the OIDC job, Homebrew 0.7.1; smoke test on a clean 0.7.1 install passed. The referencing commit 'Release 0.7.1' (36d4c57e134761d7a4e840db035bd20577b066ab) carries the 'rebar-ticket: 8d1d-941c-9589-4004' trailer and is on origin/main (reachable from this worktree HEAD via git log --grep). Force-closing because the file-impact commit-gate resolves through the tracker symlink to the main checkout, which a parallel session left on a stale branch missing this commit — an environment artifact, not missing work.". Session: aadad0f29.
